title: Visioning
description: Articulate a clear personal and venture vision aligned with long-term agency goals.

title: Goal Setting
description: Translate vision into measurable short- and long-term goals with accountability checkpoints.

title: Financial Literacy
description: Apply foundational financial concepts to client conversations and personal practice planning.

title: Financial Needs Analysis
description: Conduct structured needs analysis conversations using SPIKE advisory frameworks.

title: Client Discovery
description: Discover client motivations, constraints, and priorities through consultative dialogue.

title: Risk Management
description: Identify, communicate, and mitigate financial and professional risks for clients and practice.

title: Prospecting
description: Build and prioritize a natural market pipeline using ethical prospecting methods.

title: Presentation Skills
description: Deliver clear, persuasive presentations tailored to audience and venture board standards.

title: Leadership
description: Demonstrate squad leadership, coaching behaviors, and accountability for team outcomes.

title: Recruitment Awareness
description: Understand agency-building recruitment principles and talent pipeline development.
